moderation.title: Admin Moderation Queue
moderation.description: Monitor and moderate customer reviews. Reviews that pass the AI filter or are reported by agents will appear here for the Admin to make a final decision.

search.title: Queue
search.description: Search by customer, property name, or review content.

actions.approveDesc: Optional note for internal audit before publishing this review.
actions.rejectDesc: Add a short note explaining why this review is being rejected.
actions.approvePlaceholder: Reviewed by admin. Safe to publish.
actions.approveSuccess: Review approved and ready to be published.
